{ "name": "sebastian/type", "description": "Collection of value objects that represent the types of the PHP type system", "type": "library", "homepage": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/type", "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Sebastian Bergmann", "email": "sebastian@phpunit.de", "role": "lead" } ], "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/type/issues", "security": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/type/security/policy" }, "prefer-stable": true, "require": { "php": ">=8.3" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.0" }, "config": { "platform": { "php": "8.3.0" }, "optimize-autoloader": true, "sort-packages": true }, "autoload": { "classmap": [ "src/" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "classmap": [ "tests/_fixture" ], "files": [ "tests/_fixture/callback_function.php", "tests/_fixture/functions_that_declare_return_types.php" ] }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "6.0-dev" } } }
